title: Dense Post-Workout Algerian Fettuccine Pasta
description: This hearty Algerian-inspired fettuccine dish is designed to replenish energy stores post-workout. A blend of flavorful spices and wholesome ingredients fuels recovery.
instructions: In a large pot, boil salted water for cooking fettuccine.
Add fettuccine to the boiling water and cook for 8 minutes, or until al dente.
In a separate pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic and saut 4 until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add cumin and paprika to the pan, cooking for 1 minute, then stir in chicken broth and diced tomatoes.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add cooked fettuccine to the pan, tossing to coat with the sauce.
Shred or chop cooked chicken breast and add to the pasta.
Sprinkle chopped almonds on top of the pasta for added crunch.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
